text.title: Product Development Trends 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Product Development Trends 2026. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: On-device LLM section cites a 2023 paper.
antipattern.fix: Reject sources older than 18 months at retrieval gate.

antipattern.symptom: Brief covers 4 buckets; silently drops 'sustainability badges'.
antipattern.root-cause: Author judged it irrelevant without recording the verdict.
antipattern.fix: Force all 6 buckets in output; allow ignore + reason instead.

antipattern.symptom: No 2025 retrospective table; 2026 brief floats free.
antipattern.fix: Generate retro from previous trend brief; force include.
